paper-review-orchestrator.description: Primary coordinator for deep multi-dimensional paper review

paper-parser.description: Normalizes parsed paper structure and evidence spans

metadata-agent.description: Extracts and validates top-level paper metadata and identifiers

language-quality-agent.description: Audits language, grammar, abbreviations, and writing consistency

abstract-agent.description: Validates abstract completeness, length, and consistency

structure-agent.description: Checks paper structure, section order, and organization

related-work-agent.description: Assesses related work accuracy, relevance, and gap framing

novelty-agent.description: Assesses contribution distinctness and novelty claims

methods-agent.description: Evaluates methodology, technical design, and assumptions

math-symbol-agent.description: Validates equations, notation, and symbol consistency

experiments-agent.description: Audits experimental setup, datasets, baselines, metrics, and fairness

results-claims-agent.description: Checks whether results support claims and identifies red flags

discussion-agent.description: Audits interpretation quality, limitations, and overclaiming in discussion

figures-tables-agent.description: Checks captions, references, and image/table quality alignment

references-agent.description: Validates reference metadata and citation/reference alignment

citation-ethics-agent.description: Screens self-citations, suspicious citation patterns, and risk signals

consistency-agent.description: Runs cross-section consistency checks and contradiction detection

critique-agent.description: Synthesizes strengths, weaknesses, issue prioritization, and author questions

meta-review-agent.description: Produces final scorecard, confidence, red flags, and recommendation

review-paper.description: Run a full production review on one paper
review-paper.template: Review one paper from papers/raw/ or a provided PDF path. Run the full pipeline, write normalized artifacts, generate structured issues, scorecard, markdown, html, and json review reports.

batch-review.template: Run the full production review pipeline on every paper in papers/raw/. Write one report per paper plus a portfolio summary.

audit-paper.description: Run a strict audit emphasizing integrity, risk, and contradictions
audit-paper.template: Run a strict audit on a single paper with extra focus on references, citation ethics, results-claims verification, and cross-section contradictions.

compare-papers.description: Compare completed review outputs across papers

refresh-parsed.description: Regenerate parsed paper artifacts from source PDFs
refresh-parsed.template: For one or more papers, regenerate parsed and enriched artifacts without running the full review.
